feedback.technicalIssues: There were just two different moments in two separate games where the controls stopped working, and I couldn't play the games. Other than that, everything worked as it needed.
feedback.confusingParts: No, there were no confusing parts to me.
feedback.suggestions: I don't have any suggestions or feedback.
feedback.funCriteria: I just decided if it was fun based on how the overall game experience made me feel during the time I was playing it.
